name: streamos-monorepo
description: StreamOS monorepo for creator discoverability, monetization, automation, branding, multi-platform management, and analytics.

scripts.infra:logs: docker compose logs -f redis api-gateway automation-service stream-job-worker repurposing-worker publishing-worker publishing-scheduler-worker clip-worker transcription-worker content-job-retry-worker
scripts.infra:up: docker compose up -d redis api-gateway automation-service stream-job-worker repurposing-worker publishing-worker publishing-scheduler-worker clip-worker transcription-worker content-job-retry-worker
scripts.test:railway-audit: node --test scripts/private-automation-url.test.cjs scripts/e2e-transcription-job.test.cjs scripts/railway-audit-core.test.cjs scripts/audit-railway-env.test.cjs scripts/operator-cli.test.cjs scripts/deploy-production-workflow.test.cjs scripts/production-gate-proof.test.cjs scripts/branding-hosted-evidence.test.cjs scripts/validate-database-security.test.cjs
scripts.validate: pnpm lint && pnpm test:railway-audit && pnpm test:branch-audit && pnpm test:turbo-env-policy && pnpm test:vercel-audit && pnpm turbo run lint typecheck test build && pnpm db:validate-security && pnpm test:fastapi
scripts.validate:ci: pnpm lint && pnpm test:railway-audit && pnpm test:branch-audit && pnpm test:turbo-env-policy && pnpm test:vercel-audit && pnpm -r --if-present run lint && pnpm -r --if-present run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build && pnpm -r --if-present run test && pnpm db:validate-security && pnpm test:fastapi
